chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Sales Tax Reference Application 27 of 2019 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.322/2019 2. For hearing of main case 3. For hearing of CMA No.323/2019 17.10.2025 Mr. Zamir Khalid, Commissioner (Legal) SRB, on behalf of applicant is present and does not press this reference application which is dismissed as withdrawn. A copy of this order may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 63 of the Sindh Sales Tax on Services Act, 2011. Judge Judge Amjad
